name: Mech Bots Arena
author: Poki
description: Mech Bots Arena is an action-packed robot battle game where you dive into intense fights in massive arenas! Destroy enemy bots, dodge deadly traps, and grow stronger with every victory. Earn coins, unlock powerful upgrades, and customize your bot to match your style. Ready to build your ultimate mech and crush the competition? How to play Mech Bots Arena? Move with WASD or arrow keys or the joystick Who created Mech Bots Arena? Mech Bots Arena is created by Lumamind. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Mech Bots Arena for free? You can play Mech Bots Arena for free on Poki. Can I play Mech Bots Arena on mobile devices and desktop? Mech Bots Arena can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
